title: AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM IN SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5502 / 53 OG No. 16, 5149 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1729, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM IN SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item one, Group V, under

q

. Cebu, page three hundred seventy-four, section three of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is amended to read as follows:

"1. Tumalog Barrio School Building, Oslob Construction

P5,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
